series_metadata.series_description: Design competition, coordinated by DOW, stamps to be purchased by duck hunters as well as non-hunters and stamp collectors. Funds from the sale of limited edition prints are made available by the artist to benefit wildlife conservation through a profit sharing arrangement. Stamps are consigned to agents for sale. Returned unused stamps and unused serial number sheets are destroyed by authority of ORC 1531.02. Stamps are destroyed for accounting purposes and to insure collectability of stamp by artist.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: stamp is valued provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released
